rationale: Hard pass. The Goku/Kamehameha anime power-fantasy hook collides with Sand Loop's calm, ASMR sorting DNA on every axis: palette overlaps only superficially (blue), the visual_action shows zero conveyor/sand/pixel-reveal mechanic, and the implied audience (shounen anime fans, often male teens) barely overlaps with 25-45 casual sorting-puzzle players. Add IP/trademark risk on Goku and a stale 385d freshness with only 2 advertisers — not worth testing even as a misdirect hook.
